title: Standardized proof envelope with application/bolyra+json content type
description: Define a JSON envelope format for proof payloads that all framework integrations use: {version, circuit, publicSignals[], proof{pi_a, pi_b, pi_c}, metadata{framework, sdkVersion, provingTimeMs}}. Register application/bolyra+json as the content type. This lets any HTTP-based agent framework (MCP servers, OpenAI function calling proxies, REST tool servers) accept Bolyra proofs via a standard Authorization header (Bearer bolyra:<base64-envelope>) without framework-specific code. Include a generic Express/FastAPI middleware that validates the header, so tool servers get ZK auth in 3 lines.
